value.stringValue: Group 2b: Financial and social history documents

rightValue.stringValue: Current driving licence photocard - (full or provisional)
Birth certificate - issued within 12 months of birth
Birth certificate - issued after time of birth
Immigration document, visa or work permit
Current driving licence (full or provisional) - paper version (if issued before 1998)
Group 2b: Financial and social history documents

Flow.interviewLabel: Vetting and Compliance - RMG - ID Documents {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - RMG - ID Documents

value.stringValue: Please choose the document type below:

fields.name: BA_Privacy_policy4
fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

fields.name: Pending_Text
fields.fieldText:
In order to verify your identify we need at least 1 document from:

  • Group 1: Primary identity documents

And 2 further documents from either:

  • Group 1: Primary identity documents
  • Group 2a: Trusted government documents
  • Group 2b: Financial and social history documents

To view which documents are accepted from each group use the toggles below:

fields.name: Group1Text
fields.fieldText:
• Passport
  • Biometric residence permit
  • Current driving licence photocard - (full or provisional)
  • Birth certificate - issued within 12 months of birth
  • Adoption certificate

fields.name: Group2Text
fields.fieldText:
• Current driving licence photocard - (full or provisional)
  • Current driving licence (full or provisional) - paper version (if issued before 1998)
  • Birth certificate - issued after time of birth
  • Marriage/civil partnership certificate
  • Immigration document, visa or work permit
  • HM Forces ID card
  • Firearms licence

value.stringValue: Group 2b: Financial and social history documents

fields.name: Group2btext
fields.fieldText:
• Mortgage statement
  • Bank or building society statement
  • Bank or building society statement
  • Bank or building society account opening confirmation letter
  • Credit card statement
  • Financial statement, for example pension or endowment
  • P45 or P60 statement
  • Council Tax statement
  • Letter of sponsorship from future employment provider
  • Utility bill
  • Benefit statement, for example Child Benefit, Pension
  • Central or local government, government agency, or local council document giving entitlement, for example from the Department for Work and Pensions, the Employment Service, HMRC
  • EEA National ID card
  • Irish Passport Card
  • Cards carrying the PASS accreditation logo
  • Letter from head teacher or college principal

fields.name: LinkText
fields.fieldText: Click here for more information on the government guidelines

fields.name: Completed_Text
fields.fieldText:
✔

Status: Completed

Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Completed_Date__c}

textTemplates.name: DocumentText
textTemplates.text:
IDENTIFICATION DOCUMENTATION

Status: Completed

Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

{!SupportingText}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextVar
textTemplates.text:
ID Type: {!IDType.value}

ID Group: {!Group}
